SourceString: Chapter 1: Outskirts of the Moonlit Village
Recover the lost moonlight around Lumina and confirm the threat of the Mist Lord.
Village Field
Search the bright field just outside Lumina for traces of the extinguished lanterns.
Sapling Trail
Investigate footprints that return to the same place and echoes that repeat.
Mist Cave
Find the first shard of the dimensional rift in a cave the moonlight cannot reach.
Wraith Ruins
Read the memory stone in the collapsed ruins and witness the rift accident from thirty years ago.
Forgotten Temple
Face why the Mist Lord seized the moonlight guardian stone in the ruined temple at the forest's end.
Mist Lord
The Chapter 1 final boss, a commander of the mistbound host touched by the Abyss Realm's fog.
Memory of the Moonshadow Realm
Rebirth is not a reset; it is the process of reclaiming memories left in the Moonshadow Realm and growing stronger.
On Chapter 1 entry, class branches use one line of character tone only and never explain combat performance.
Keep the 12+ tone by using mist, whispers, and blurred afterimages to create tension.
Chapter 3: Shadow of the Dimension Lord
Trace rebirth memories and the Dimension Lord's shadow at the border of the Moonshadow Realm and the Abyss Realm.
Shadow Temple Road
Confirm shadow anomalies and reflecting lanterns on a temple approach where moonlight does not reflect.
Inverted Corridor
Find the Silver Lantern Society's final entry record in a corridor whose ceiling and floor memories are reversed.
Silent Observatory
Gain evidence that the Apostles of Moonshadow observed the rift in an observation sector where sound has vanished.
Moonshadow Stairs
Find the same stairs seen during rebirth and open a clue about the hero's past.
Dark Gate Outpost
An elite gate at the first seal before the Abyss gate, where the Dark Gatekeeper blocks progress.
Abyss Rift Belt
A rift zone where pressure from the Abyss Realm leaks directly and Dark becomes dense.
Room of Lost Names
Reveal the Silver Lantern Society's sacrifices through erased researcher nameplates and Raon's source record.
Moonless Sanctuary
Discover the Abyss Realm's opposite rule through a black guardian stone structured like Lumina's.
Dimensional Gate Heart
Hear Verkas's final proposal in the center where the dimensional gate opens and closes like a heartbeat.
Throne of the Lord's Shadow
The Chapter 3 final boss area where the hero faces the shadow of Verkas, the Dimension Lord.
Dark Gatekeeper
The Chapter 3 elite boss that guards the first Abyss gate seal and introduces the Dark gate.
Dimension Lord Verkas
The shadow of a being holding the Abyss Realm's door by will, and the Chapter 3 final boss.
Dark represents Abyss Realm pressure and the absence of moonlight, appearing heavily in late Chapter 3.
Chapter 4: Backlit Corridor of the Abyss
Follow the backlit corridor beyond Verkas's shadow and turn the direction of the Abyss sentence.
Backlit Approach
Find a passage of reversed light and Nadia's field record behind Verkas's throne.
Ash Record Room
Confirm the Silver Lantern Society's failed records in a room where burned research repeats as ash.
Frost Diffraction Bridge
Find the link between rebirth memory and backlight coordinates where frozen light bends like a bridge.
Lightning Tuning Tower
Gain evidence of a bargain between part of the Apostles of Moonshadow and Verkas at a tower that tunes rift frequency.
Backlight Seal Road
An elite gate where the Backlight Watcher tests the hero on the middle seal road that binds backlight.
Moonlight Reverse-Flow Layer
Realize that rebirth memory can become fuel for the Abyss mechanism in a layer where moonlight flows upward.
Silent Vow Chamber
Confirm that some in the Silver Lantern Society fixed the rift in place with vows in a chamber of soundless sentences.
Starless Gate
Create a moment where the hero must trust what they saw directly over records at a gate without stars or moonlight.
Sentence Depth
Hear Asterion's final vow in the boss approach where Abyss sentences are carved in layers.
Asterion's Backlit Throne
The Chapter 4 final area where the hero defeats Abyss Sentence Asterion and opens the next door toward Verkas's true body.
Backlight Watcher
The Chapter 4 elite boss that tests the direction of light and dark on the Backlight Seal Road.
Abyss Sentence Asterion
The Chapter 4 final boss that guards the Abyss sentence leading toward Verkas's true body.
Backlight is the Abyss mechanism property that reverses the direction of light to fix a rift in place.
Chapter 5: The Dimension Lord's Abyss Throne
Descend beyond the door whose backlight was bent and face Dimension Lord Verkas's true body and the Abyss Throne.
Lightless Descent
Step down for the first time beneath the door Asterion overturned, along a descent no light can reach.
Quenched Lantern Graves
Confirm traces of the first rift the Silver Lantern Society never managed to close, among graves of quenched lanterns.
Memory Sediment Basin
See how Verkas uses memory as fuel in a basin where rebirth memory has settled and hardened.
Hall of Stigma Echoes
Recover the last stigma left by the Apostles of Moonshadow in a hall haunted by the echoes of a fallen sanctuary.
Abyss Reverberation Road
An elite gate facing the Void Herald on the middle seal road where the lord's voice reverberates.
Frost Crystal Depths
Learn the danger of memory freezing as the lord's true body draws near, in a zone filled with frozen crystal depths.
Void Suture
Receive Nadia's records one last time in a zone where a torn dimension is sutured shut with darkness.
Thunderpeal Barrier
Cross the boundary of record and reality together with Raon at the last thunderpeal barrier that holds back the lord's will.
Throne Antechamber
Receive Iris's final warning and choice as an Apostle of Moonshadow in the antechamber just before the Abyss Throne.
Verkas's Abyss Throne
The Chapter 5 final area where the hero defeats Dimension Lord Verkas's true body and brings down the Abyss Throne.
Void Herald
The Chapter 5 elite boss that blocks the way, relaying the lord's voice on the Abyss Reverberation Road.
Dimension Lord Verkas, True Body
The Chapter 5 final boss who holds the dimension from the Abyss Throne by real will, not a shadow.
The Voidheart is the core of the Abyss Throne that absorbs both light and memory and turns them back into the lord's will.
Chapter 6: The Collapsing Root Rift
Slow rather than seal the root rift that collapses on its own after the lord is gone, and face the End Void.
Fallen Throne Site
Measure that the rift began to collapse rather than close, where Verkas's throne fell and a void opened.
Sliding Graves
Confirm the guilt of the beginning returning as the end's collapse, as the graves of the first unclosed rift slide into the void.
Surging Sediment Basin
Hold scattering memory by coordinate in a basin where settled rebirth memory surges back upward.
Last Stigma Road
In a passage lit by the recovered stigma, the light meant for the lord becomes the light that pulls people out.
Reverberant Collapse Road
An elite gate facing the Echo of Collapse on a middle collapse road where past bosses' reverberations overlap.
Freezing Boundary
In a zone where the three layers' boundary freezes, it is revealed that Raon carves away at himself to slow the collapse.
Drawn-In Void Edge
In a zone where the void's edge draws everything in, Nadia chooses everyone's time over the time to escape herself.
Collapsing Thunderpeal Bridge
On the last bridge that breaks and reconnects within the collapse, Raon leaves a final coordinate before fading.
Void Antechamber
In the antechamber just before the End Void, Iris speaks of why she remains at your side though her charge is lost.
End Void
The Chapter 6 final area where the hero stops the End Void from drawing the three layers in together, the terminus of the self-collapsing root rift.
Echo of Collapse
The Chapter 6 elite boss that belches out overlapping reverberations of past bosses on the Reverberant Collapse Road.
End Void
The Chapter 6 final boss and terminus of the root rift, drawing everything in without will or voice.
Chapter 7: The Residual Realm Beyond the Rift
Cross beyond the stilled rift into the residual realm, bring the stopped home, and close the threshold from the far side to face the Eternal Threshold.
Beyond the Stilled Threshold
Cross for the first time the threshold held open rather than closed, entering the residual realm where everything the void drew in remains frozen.
Ashen Standstill Plain
Find the way by following an unextinguished ember on a plain frozen ashen gray with stopped time.
Residual Sanctuary
See the apostles' stigma become the marker of the homeward path in the afterimage of an old sanctuary halted in the residual realm.
Flickering Coordinate Field
Cross deeper along a zone where the faded Raon's echo points the way, flickering with only its last coordinate.
Stilled Homeward Path
An elite gate facing the Unreturned on a middle homeward path where those who could not return are frozen into one mass blocking the way.
Frozen Recollection Road
Wake memories to send residual souls home one by one in a passage where halted recollections float like ice.
Sunken Coordinate Depths
Find the final measurement of the one who never escaped to connect the homeward path, in the depths where Nadia's last coordinate has sunk.
Rekindling Hearth
The stopped world begins to flow again, little by little, at a hearth where halted embers blaze anew.
Homeward Antechamber
In the antechamber just before the Eternal Threshold where those who would return gather, Iris promises to go home herself after everyone has returned.
Eternal Threshold
The Chapter 7 final area where the hero crosses the residual realm's last homeward path, sends the stopped home, and closes the threshold, which closes only after all have returned together.
The Unreturned
The Chapter 7 elite boss, those who could not return frozen into one mass blocking the way, their very will to return stilled, on the Stilled Homeward Path.
Eternal Threshold
The Chapter 7 final boss and the residual realm's last homeward path, which closes only after all have returned together.
Chapter 8: The Afterrift That Lay Sealed
Descend into the afterrift revealed at the closed rift's site, an older threat the rift had been caging, to raise the seal anew and face its apex.
The Closed Scar
Descend for the first time beneath the closed scar, where what lay sealed begins to surface at the site of the rift everyone believed was finished.
The Woken Trail
Follow the footprints of something that has woken and begun to move, not a stopped world, across ground strewn with traces of the age the rift caged.
The Sunken Afterrift
See how deep the seal pressed in an ancient realm that lay sunk beyond the closed rift, where not even the apostles' light ever reached.
The Risen Coordinate Field
Head toward the apex along a zone where a signal newly risen from beyond the seal, never once measured, announces its own location.
The Risen Ground
An elite gate facing the Risen Remnant on a middle ground where what rose only when the rift closed now blocks the way.
The Pressed Recollection Road
Read the means of holding it down in a passage where the seal's method is graven, and raise anew the seal that was lost.
The Core of the Seal
Reach the beginning of this threat at the core of the seal, the place the rift pressed deepest, where the revealed thing's roots reach down.
The Revealed Expanse
Cross the broad revealed ground, where the woken rise at every place the seal broke, toward where the apex stands.
The Apex Antechamber
Steel for the confrontation in the antechamber just before the apex, where neither closing nor merely holding can end it, to raise the seal anew.
The Sealed Apex
The Chapter 8 final area where the hero presses down and seals again what broke loose as the rift closed, turning the closed site into a sealed site.
The Risen Remnant
The Chapter 8 elite boss, the remnant that rose at last from where it lay pressed down once the rift had closed, blocking the way.
The Sealed Apex
The Chapter 8 final boss and the apex of what the rift had sealed, a thing that has been caged but never ended.
Chapter 9: The Resonance the Echo Woke
The afterworld's echo, left from raising the seal anew, twists each foe's essence into two layers so weakness and resistance wake together; descend into this resonant realm and face its apex.
The First Grain of the Echo
Step onto the first grain where the echo turns in the reraised afterworld, and face foes whose resistance, not only their weakness, has begun to wake.
The Twofold Echo
Map the place where one essence splits into the two layers of weakness and resistance and echoes, and read how the resonance twists each foe.
The Crossed Resonance Road
In a passage where the hand that strikes the weakness and the hand the resistance turns away cross, forge the strength to pierce both layers at once.
The Risen Resonance Field
Climb toward the apex of the twice-twisted essence along a zone where the echo rises highest and the resonance is stacked like a tower.
The Resonant Remnant
An elite gate facing the Resonant Remnant on a middle ground, where a remnant risen wrapped in two layers of the reraised seal's echo blocks the way.
The Re-echoed Recollection Road
In a passage graven with how the echo left from raising the seal split each essence into two layers, read that split in reverse to find a way to master the resonance.
The Core of the Resonance
Reach the start of this twisting at the core of the resonance, where the echo rings deepest and the roots of the twice-twisted essence reach down.
The Echoing Expanse
Cross the broad expanse where weakness and resistance wake together at every place the echo touches, toward where the apex of the resonance stands.
The Resonance Antechamber
Steel to sever both layers of the resonance together in the antechamber just before the apex, where neither piercing alone nor being turned away alone can end it.
The Twofold Apex
The Chapter 9 final area where the hero severs the resonance's apex that wears weakness and resistance in one body, returning the twisted essence to a single layer.
The Resonant Remnant
The Chapter 9 elite boss, a remnant that rose wrapped in two layers of the reraised seal's echo, raising weakness and resistance together to block the way.
The Twofold Apex
The Chapter 9 final boss and the apex of the resonance the echo woke, wearing weakness and resistance over one essence in two layers.
Collapse is the rift's terminal progression that, past the stage where it could be closed after the lord is gone, brings down the three layers' boundaries together.
